recommendations.what_to_take: Integrate vectorbt's vectorized backtesting engine and strategy testing framework to replace Clawmpson's current backtesting module and provide a foundation for ArbClaw's arb strategy validation. Focus on its efficient data handling and strategy optimization capabilities.
recommendations.risk: MIT license is safe. Potential complexity in adapting existing data pipelines to vectorbt's DataFrame format (requires data reshaping). Minimal maintenance risk due to active community and 7k+ stars.

recommendations.what_to_take: Extract ZVT's data collection modules (especially for crypto/stock feeds) and technical analysis tools for Clawmpson's data layer and ArbClaw's arb detection, avoiding full framework integration.
recommendations.risk: Future-dated last update (2026) suggests potential repo issue; ZVT lacks prediction market focus (Polymarket/Kalshi) so RivalClaw integration would require heavy adaptation. Apache-2.0 license is acceptable.
